headline: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. issued a press release announcing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2025.
investor_impact: The release of Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings is a critical catalyst for the stock, providing essential data on operating business performance and investment portfolio returns. Analysts will update their sum-of-the-parts valuations and assess capital allocation decisions based on the detailed results in the attached press release.
